title: SEC0: reject duplicate FileHeader for same transfer_id
description: HashMap::insert() on FileHeader silently clobbers prior FileReceiveState, discarding received chunks. Fix: use file_transfers.entry(transfer_id).or_insert_with(|| ...) and skip (with warn!) if already present.
close_reason: Fixed: Entry API with Occupied/Vacant arms; duplicate FileHeader logs warn! and skips without clobbering
